TestCase z33Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    follow_case.array1 = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case.array1, t1.array1, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Apply cumulative product on array1
    long long prod = 1;
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        prod *= follow_case.array1[i];
        follow_case.array1[i] = (int)prod;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
